name: spriteforge
description: A 2D game asset generation workspace for text-driven sprite, icon, tile, and export workflows.

scripts.check: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/generationJobs.js && node --check backend/fallbackGenerator.js && node --check frontend/src/app.js && node --check frontend/src/assetLibrary.js && node --check shared/generationSchema.js
scripts.test: node scripts/test-generation-schema.js && node scripts/test-fallback-generator.js && node scripts/test-generation-jobs.js && node scripts/test-asset-library.js
